name: Hawaiian Baked Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pineapple chunks in juice, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, mix flour, salt, celery salt, nutmeg, soy sauce, sugar, and cornstarch.
2. Coat chicken breasts evenly with the flour mixture.
3. Heat 1/8 inch of oil in a skillet over medium heat. Brown the chicken on all sides until golden brown.
4. Place the chicken skin-side up in a baking dish.
5. In another skillet, sauté onion and green pepper in remaining oil until tender.
6. Combine pineapple chunks with reserved juice in a separate bowl.
7. Pour the pineapple mixture over the chicken in the baking dish.
8. Cover the dish tightly with foil and bake at 400°F for 45 minutes.
9. During the last 30 minutes of baking, add sautéed onion and green pepper to the chicken.
